channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Sous les 400 euros, la Nintendo Switch 2 devient bien plus tentante sur Joybuy
item.description: La Nintendo Switch 2, console hybride de Nintendo sortie en juin 2025, est disponible pour 399 euros sur Joybuy en cochant le coupon sur la page du produit. Une belle occasion de craquer pour la nouvelle génération de la console la plus populaire du moment.

item.title: OpenAI's browser isn't dead, it just moved to the ChatGPT app
item.description: Let's be real, OpenAI isn't giving up on the browser market, it is just changing its strategy.

item.title: Xiaomi has a NAS device, sitting alongside a supercar, a rice cooker, a nose hair trimmer, and smartphones, of course
item.description: Xiaomi's latest product to turn heads may not be a smartphone or an automobile, but rather network-attached storage for its domestic market

item.title: A decade later, Pokémon Go finally made good on its original promise
item.description: When Niantic dropped the first Pokémon Go trailer in 2015, it was hard to grasp how a bunch of players could work together to catch a pokémon like Mewtwo. But this week at the game's 10th anniversary event in New York City, Pokémon Go showed the world how it's done. Almost 2,000 players (many of […]

item.title: The Meta Glasses backlash is changing how (or if) people use them
item.description: Backlash online is changing how (or if) people wear Meta's smart glasses.

item.title: Wall Street is debating the AI buildout. Enterprises just answered: 86% say their GPUs run at half capacity or less
item.description: Enterprise companies are running AI agents ahead of the controls needed to manage them — and they deployed that way knowingly. That is the central finding from VentureBeat Research's June survey of 573 technical leaders at companies with 100 or more employees, fielded across five parallel surveys of the agentic stack. Enterprises are now retrofitting to catch up with their own standards, and they are budgeting for it: Roughly six in 10 enterprises plan to switch or add vendors in each of five control layers within the next 12 months, and roughly a third — depending on the layer — plan to move ...

item.title: StubHub CEO is helping fund mass scalpers on his own platform
item.description: Stubhub CEO Eric Baker is pouring millions of dollars into the ticket-scalping market, CBC reports.

item.title: ICE is threatening to deport witnesses of its latest shooting
item.description: Advocates are demanding that the Department of Homeland Security release bodycam footage of the fatal shooting of Lorenzo Salgado Araujo, a Mexican immigrant who was killed by ICE officers in Houston during a traffic stop earlier this week. But DHS claims the agents involved in the shooting weren't wearing body cameras because of the lengthy […]

item.title: FCC grants approval for sun-reflecting space mirror that's been widely criticized by astronomers
item.description: Reflect Orbital wants to direct sunlight at night with a network of satellites.

item.title: On commence à voir un mystérieux fond diffus émit par les supernovae de l'Univers
item.description: Une analyse portant sur environ 5 000 jours de données d'observation fournies par un détecteur géant au Japon laisse penser que l'on commencerait à observer un autre fond diffus cosmique que le rayonnement fossile et produit depuis des milliards d'années par toutes les explosions d'étoiles en...

item.title: Ransomware attacks against education sector rise 16% in one year becoming the new favorite target — and reckless GenAI use could be to blame
item.description: Most of the attacks took place in Latin America, while Africa experienced a decrease.

item.title: This 1-pound drone killer is the size of a Subway sandwich — but it can outrun a Black Hawk
item.description: Nordic Air Defense’s K100XR is a foot-long carbon fiber drone that can exceed 220 mph and uses AI to intercept and destroy enemy aircraft.

item.title: Metal balls from space are popping up on Australia's beaches
item.description: Sadly, we don't think aliens were involved in this particular space balls incident.

item.title: A key federal election agency suddenly has no commissioners. Here’s why that matters.
item.description: The White House removed the commission’s remaining members, leaving future appointments subject to Senate confirmation. The Trump administration gutted a bipartisan federal agency that oversees elections on Thursday, a worrying decision with midterms just around the corner.

item.title: Vélos électriques Angell : l’interminable bras de fer à plusieurs millions d’euros qui paralyse des milliers de clients
item.description: Repris par Rebirth à l’été 2025, Angell reste suspendu à une bataille de responsabilités entre SEB, Kickmaker et les différents acteurs de sa chaîne industrielle. Tandis que le repreneur affirme pousser pour une solution de remplacement, de nombreux clients réclament surtout un remboursement et dénoncent une attente devenue interminable. Entre vélos immobilisés, problèmes de connectivité et avenir incertain de la marque, le dossier Angell demeure enlisé dans un bras de fer où chacun attend de savoir qui paiera. ...
